entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The region in India where the study on insect pests and their nematode parasites was conducted

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Pests collected from cultivated and wild plant species to study their parasites

entities.name: NEMATODES
entities.description: Parasites that emerged from insect pests, showing activity based on season and soil type

entities.name: HEXAMERMIS SPP
entities.description: Nematode species commonly found as parasites in most lepidoptera

entities.name: LEPIDOPTERA
entities.description: Order of insects that are common hosts for Hexamermis spp.

entities.name: OVOMERMIS ALBICANS
entities.description: Nematode species recovered from Heliothis spp.

entities.name: HELIOTHIS SPP
entities.description: Insect pests from which Ovomermis albicans was recovered

entities.name: EARLY MONSOON
entities.description: The time period during which nematodes were highly active

entities.name: LIGHT-SOILS
entities.description: Soil type where nematode activity was higher

entities.name: HEAVY-SOILS
entities.description: Soil type where nematode activity was lower

entities.name: HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: A specific insect pest showing higher nematode incidence on low-growing crops

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Low-growing crop (Arachis hypogaea) where nematode incidence against Heliothis armigera was higher

entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: Low-growing crop (Lycopersicon esculentum) where nematode incidence against Heliothis armigera was higher

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Wild plants where nematode incidence against Heliothis armigera was higher

entities.name: PENTATOMIMERMIS SP
entities.description: Nematode species recorded from the bug Nezara viridula

entities.name: NEZARA VIRIDULA
entities.description: A bug species parasitized by Pentatomimermis sp.
